analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e feature naming and structure. The level (6th) and class (monk) are correctly assigned.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is a direct and accurate reproduction of the official rule text for the Monk class feature.

mechanics.effect: Grants magical damage status to unarmed strikes.
mechanics.trigger: Always active upon reaching level 6 as a Monk.
mechanics.interaction: Directly addresses common resistances/immunities (nonmagical resistance/immunity to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage). It is a crucial feature for Monks to remain relevant against certain enemies at mid-levels.
mechanics.clarifications_needed: None. The wording is precise ('count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage').
